description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Xero Portal 1.2 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the phpbb_root_path parameter to (1) admin_linkdb.php, (2) admin_forum_prune.php, (3) admin_extensions.php, (4) admin_board.php, (5) admin_attachments.php, or (6) admin_users.php in admin/.
